CVE-2022-0367.title: A heap-based buffer overflow flaw was found in libmodbus in funct ...
CVE-2022-0367.summary: A heap-based buffer overflow flaw was found in libmodbus in function modbus_reply() in src/modbus.c.

CVE-2023-26793.title: libmodbus v3.1.10 has a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability  ...
CVE-2023-26793.summary: libmodbus v3.1.10 has a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in read_io_status function in src/modbus.c.

CVE-2024-10918.title: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libmodbus v3.1.10 al ...
CVE-2024-10918.summary:
Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libmodbus v3.1.10 allows to overflow the buffer allocated for the Modbus response if the function tries to reply to a Modbus request with an
unexpected length.

CVE-2024-34244.title: libmodbus v3.1.10 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via the modbus ...
CVE-2024-34244.summary: libmodbus v3.1.10 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow via the modbus_write_bits function. This issue can be triggered when the function is fed with specially crafted input, which leads to out-of-bounds read and can potentially cause a crash or other unintended behaviors.

CVE-2024-36843.title: libmodbus v3.1.6 was discovered to contain a heap overflow via th ...
CVE-2024-36843.summary: libmodbus v3.1.6 was discovered to contain a heap overflow via the modbus_mapping_free() function.

CVE-2024-36844.title: libmodbus v3.1.6 was discovered to contain a use-after-free via t ...
CVE-2024-36844.summary: libmodbus v3.1.6 was discovered to contain a use-after-free via the ctx->backend pointer. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted message sent to the unit-test-server.

CVE-2024-36845.title: An invalid pointer in the modbus_receive() function of libmodbus  ...
CVE-2024-36845.summary: An invalid pointer in the modbus_receive() function of libmodbus v3.1.6 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted message sent to the unit-test-server.
